channel.title: Dbt on Arjun Sajeevan
channel.description: Recent content in Dbt on Arjun Sajeevan

item.title: Analytics Engineering with dbt & Databricks: Building a Production-Grade Data Warehouse
item.description: A complete, end-to-end analytics engineering project — transforming raw, messy e-commerce data into a clean, tested, and documented warehouse using dbt and Databricks Community Edition.

item.title: What is dbt and Why Do Companies Use It?
item.description: A clear explanation of dbt (data build tool) — what it does, why it has become a standard in modern data engineering, and what makes it genuinely different from writing raw SQL.
